enroll.title: Set up two-factor authentication
enroll.scanInstructions: Open your authenticator app and scan this QR code to add your account.
enroll.manualEntry: Can't scan? Enter this code manually:

verify.label: Verification code
verify.title: Verify setup
verify.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm setup.
verify.error: Invalid verification code. Please try again.

recovery.title: Save your recovery codes
recovery.warning: Store them in a safe place. They cannot be shown again. Each code can only be used once.

challenge.title: Two-factor authentication
challenge.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
challenge.lockedOut: Account temporarily locked due to too many failed attempts.

settings.title: Two-factor authentication
settings.policyRequired: MFA is required by your organization policy and cannot be disabled.
settings.disableConfirmText: This will remove the extra security layer from your account.

tenantSettings.title: Authentication Settings
tenantSettings.subtitle: Configure multi-factor authentication policy for your organization.
tenantSettings.policyOptional: Optional - Users can choose to enable MFA
tenantSettings.requiredRolesHint: Specify which roles must have MFA enabled.
tenantSettings.readonlyNotice: Only Tenant Admins can modify authentication settings.
